title: NESARA / GESARA
summary: The abundance program — denounced as a psyop in 2020, embraced as 'Emergency Protocol 103' by 2023.
markdown:
**NESARA / GESARA** — the fabled abundance and financial-reset program — has one of the most
interesting arcs in the archive, because the sessions take **both sides of it**.

In the **October 23, 2020** session, Unimetrix 1 is dismissive: NESARA/GESARA and the stimulus
narratives are **psyops** — engineered hope, part of the era's manufactured noise. Three years
later, the **December 23, 2023** session embraces the program wholesale: an "Emergency
Protocol 103" to release funds to lightworkers, the **Saint Germain Trust**, Agarthan and
"Dragon Family" treasure, and a wealth transfer folded into the approach to
[first contact](/lore/first-contact/) — with the true "gold economy," it adds, running on
[crypto](/lore/bitcoin/) rather than the rumored revalued banknotes, which remain disinfo.

The 2023 session wraps the program in deep lore: **Tartaria** and the "first great reset" of
1812–1815, Saint Germain identified with Francis Bacon, [Agartha's](/lore/agartha/) vaults
beneath the surface. Whether the 2020 denunciation and the 2023 embrace are contradiction or
— in the sessions' own terms — a [changed timeline](/lore/the-chronicle/), the archive leaves
to the reader; both statements are preserved exactly as spoken.

NESARA/GESARA is the clearest case of the archive arguing with itself across the years — and
of how its answer to every such tension is the same: *the timeline moved.*
